goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'north' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'same price range as the hotel' and should serve 'north indian' food.
The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'indian' food.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'restaurant' by '17:45'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should be in the moderate price range and doesn't need to have free parking
Make sure you get whether they have internet and address
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same price range as the hotel and should serve north indian food
The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves indian food
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the restaurant by 17:45
Make sure you get contact number and car type
